title: Bottleneck Effect Explained
script_summary: A clear and concise explanation of the bottleneck effect in evolution.

segments.voiceover: What if a tiny change could reshape an entire species?
This is the bottleneck effect, a crucial concept in evolution.
When a population's size drastically reduces, genetic diversity plummets.
Imagine a forest fire wiping out most of a species. Surviving members have fewer genes.
This can lead to inbreeding and reduced resilience against diseases. It's a genetic gamble.
Want to dive deeper into evolutionary science? Hit subscribe for more!
